items.name: recipe_scroll_line
items.prompt: A 1024x1024 Hades-style 2.5D game asset, painterly thick brush strokes, vibrant saturated colors, strong silhouette with deep shadow outline, dramatic high-contrast lighting from upper-left at 45 degrees, rim light highlighting the subject, magical aura where applicable. A recipe scroll game icon, ancient parchment scroll with both ends rolled up, central area unrolled showing a single bold straight line tattoo pattern in dark gold ink, gilded wax seal at bottom, faint magical glow around scroll edges, centered, transparent background.
items.negative: no text, no letters, no numbers, no watermark, no signature, no logo, blurry, low contrast, flat vector, washed out, multiple subjects, frame border decoration, text, written characters
